Localization.Description: A user logged in to a host or logged out of a host

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to log in to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged out of vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged out of ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged in to ESXi host {datafield6} belonging to vCenter host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} logged in to vCenter host {event_src.host}
